metaDescription: Llama 4 Behemoth (Meta), released 2025-04 — part of the Llama 4 line. Announced as a 288B-active-parameter, 16-expert (~2T total) teacher model used to distill…
overview: Llama 4 Behemoth is a large language model from Meta, part of the Llama 4 line. Released 2025-04. Meta's flagship open-weight, natively multimodal mixture-of-experts 'herd' — the Llama 4 generation.

What's notable in this version: Announced as a 288B-active-parameter, 16-expert (~2T total) teacher model used to distill Scout and Maverick; described as still in training and NOT publicly released at the April 2025 launch.
